260 H0200B_RSPNS_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200B_RSPNS_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200B Urinary Toileting Program: Response To Toileting Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the response to the trial toileting program (e.g., scheduled toileting, prompted voiding, or bladder training). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No improvement
1=Decreased wetness
2=Completely dry (continent)
